category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Bahrain market (BSMD / MOIC, GSO standards).

title.en: China-to-Bahrain LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入巴林：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入巴林：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Bahrain market-access requirements administered by BSMD (Bahrain Standards and Metrology Directorate) under MOIC — GSO lighting standards (GSO/IEC 60598, 62560, 62471), the GSO energy-efficiency labelling scheme, and TRA radio approval for smart luminaires — versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification. Grid voltage in Bahrain is 230 V, 50 Hz.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与巴林市场准入要求对照，巴林要求由工商部（MOIC）下属巴林标准与计量局（BSMD）管理——包括 GSO 照明标准（GSO/IEC 60598、62560、62471）、GSO 能效标签方案及智能灯具的 TRA 无线电核准——并与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。巴林电网电压为 230 V、50 Hz。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與巴林市場准入要求對照，巴林要求由工商部（MOIC）下屬巴林標準與計量局（BSMD）管理——包括 GSO 照明標準（GSO/IEC 60598、62560、62471）、GSO 能效標籤方案及智能燈具的 TRA 無線電核准——並與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。巴林電網電壓為 230 V、50 Hz。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and in-country distributors should verify current Bahrain BSMD/MOIC requirements, applicable GSO standards, GSO energy-efficiency labelling thresholds, and TRA type-approval obligations with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定认定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及当地经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行巴林 BSMD/MOIC 要求、适用的 GSO 标准、GSO 能效标签阈值及 TRA 型号核准义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定認定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及當地經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行巴林 BSMD/MOIC 要求、適用的 GSO 標準、GSO 能效標籤閾值及 TRA 型號核准義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Bahrain must meet BSMD (Bahrain Standards and Metrology Directorate, under MOIC) conformity requirements for regulated products: electrical safety to GSO-adopted IEC standards (GSO IEC 60598-1 for luminaires, GSO IEC 62560 for self-ballasted lamps, plus control-gear safety); EMC to the relevant GSO/CISPR-based standard; photobiological safety to GSO IEC 62471; and compliance with the GSO energy-efficiency labelling scheme for lighting (the Gulf low-energy lamp/lighting label). Smart or wireless luminaires additionally require TRA (Telecommunications Regulatory Authority) type approval. Products are typically registered through an in-country importer and cleared at Khalifa Bin Salman Port. Bahrain runs at 230 V, 50 Hz — the 50 Hz frequency matches China but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase. Existing Chinese CCC certification and China Energy Label registration are not recognised for Bahrain market access. Note: unlike the EU, Bahrain has no broad horizontal RoHS-style restriction-of-hazardous-substances regulation for general EEE; substance control is addressed mainly through specific GSO standards and chemical rules rather than a single 10-substance directive.
answer_first.zh: 向巴林出口的中国 LED 灯具制造商须满足工商部（MOIC）下属巴林标准与计量局（BSMD）对受管制产品的合格评定要求：电气安全须符合 GSO 采纳的 IEC 标准（灯具适用 GSO IEC 60598-1，自镇流灯适用 GSO IEC 62560，另加控制装置安全要求）；电磁兼容须符合相关 GSO/CISPR 基础标准；光生物安全须符合 GSO IEC 62471；并须符合 GSO 照明能效标签方案（海湾低能耗灯/照明标签）。智能或无线灯具还须取得 TRA（电信监管局）型号核准。产品通常通过当地进口商进行注册，并在哈利法·本·萨勒曼港清关。巴林电网为 230 V、50 Hz——50 Hz 频率与中国一致，但标称电压与中国的 220 V 单相/380 V 三相不同。现有中国 CCC 认证及中国能效标识注册不被巴林市场准入所认可。注意：与欧盟不同，巴林对一般电气电子设备没有广泛的横向 RoHS 式有害物质限制法规；物质管控主要通过具体 GSO 标准及化学品规则处理，而非单一的 10 项物质指令。
answer_first.zht: 向巴林出口的中國 LED 燈具製造商須滿足工商部（MOIC）下屬巴林標準與計量局（BSMD）對受管制產品的合格評定要求：電氣安全須符合 GSO 採納的 IEC 標準（燈具適用 GSO IEC 60598-1，自鎮流燈適用 GSO IEC 62560，另加控制裝置安全要求）；電磁兼容須符合相關 GSO/CISPR 基礎標準；光生物安全須符合 GSO IEC 62471；並須符合 GSO 照明能效標籤方案（海灣低能耗燈/照明標籤）。智能或無線燈具還須取得 TRA（電信監管局）型號核准。產品通常通過當地進口商進行注冊，並在哈利法·本·薩勒曼港清關。巴林電網為 230 V、50 Hz——50 Hz 頻率與中國一致，但標稱電壓與中國的 220 V 單相/380 V 三相不同。現有中國 CCC 認證及中國能效標識注冊不被巴林市場准入所認可。注意：與歐盟不同，巴林對一般電氣電子設備沒有廣泛的橫向 RoHS 式有害物質限制法規；物質管控主要通過具體 GSO 標準及化學品規則處理，而非單一的 10 項物質指令。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Re-verify each review cycle against current BSMD/MOIC conformity requirements, the applicable GSO lighting and energy-efficiency standards list, and TRA type-approval rules before human_reviewed can be set true.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag. Bahrain GSO standard references and the GSO energy-label thresholds must be re-confirmed against the current GSO standards catalogue and BSMD technical regulations on each review cycle. No row may set verified true until checked against a primary BSMD/MOIC/GSO/TRA source.
